channel.title: Art Supply Tracker Blog
channel.description: Studio management, art history, and creative practice guides from Art Supply Tracker.

item.title: A Sampling of Paint Pigment History: From Cave Walls to Canvas
item.description: Tracing the Old Masters' oil palette back 100,000 years to Blombos Cave — the mineral chemistry behind Burnt Sienna, Yellow Ochre, and Bone Black.

item.title: 2026 Artist Grants, Residencies, and Fellowships: A Working Artist's Guide
item.description: A curated 2026 guide to artist grants, residencies, and fellowships — funding to cover supplies, studio time, and new projects, plus tips on applying.

item.title: The Real Reason Your Studio Feels Chaotic
item.description: If your studio always feels on the edge of chaos, the problem isn't you — it's that most tools were never designed for how artists actually work.

item.title: Why I'm Building Art Supply Tracker: An Art Studio Management App for Artists
item.description: Art Supply Tracker is a new art studio management app for artists who need to track supplies, manage projects, make shopping lists, and protect creative work.

item.title: How to Catalog Artwork: A Simple System for Artists Who Hate Spreadsheets
item.description: A clear, low-effort method for cataloging your artwork — what to record, how to photograph it, and why a good catalog protects your career, your insurance claims, and your sanity.

item.title: Art Studio Setup: A No-Nonsense Checklist for Working Artists
item.description: Setting up an art studio? Here's a complete checklist covering lighting, storage, workflow zones, and the small details that separate a functional studio from a frustrating one.

item.title: How to Organize Art Supplies: A Studio System That Actually Sticks
item.description: A practical, repeatable system for organizing art supplies — by medium, by project, and by frequency of use — so you spend less time hunting and more time making.
